title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate has an exciting opening for a Sales Manager at our Dhanbad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate:
Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Market Research

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate!
